name: Lemon Coconut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour once and combine with baking powder and salt.
2. Cream the butter thoroughly, then add sugar gradually until light and fluffy.
3. Add the flour alternately with milk, a small amount at a time, beating after each addition until smooth.
4. Add lemon extract.
5. Fold in egg whites quickly and thoroughly.
6. Bake in three greased 9-inch layer pans in a moderate oven (375°F) for 25 to 30 minutes.
7. Spread Coconut Lemon Filling (see recipe) about 1/2 inch thick on top of the layers.
8. Let the filling set, then adjust the layers and spread the remaining filling on the sides of the cake.
9. Sprinkle coconut generously on the sides and top of the cake.
10. Decorate the top with a 1-inch border of coconut.
